title: Warforge Factions: Remaintaned
description: Warforge is a PvP-focused faction and land-claim mod for Minecraft 1.12.2, featuring citadels, passive resource veins, and siege-based territory warfare.
body:
# Warforge

## Faction Warfare & Claiming System for PvP Servers

Warforge is a PvP-oriented faction and claim mod originally created by jamioflan (creator of Flan’s Mod) and later expanded by Mr. Norwood and EightXOR8. Built for competitive SMP environments, it provides players with tools to create factions, claim land, gather resources, and wage large-scale wars.

Core Features:

- Factions & Citadels – Players form factions by placing a citadel, which acts as the faction’s core. Leaders, officers, and members each have distinct roles and permissions.

- Chunk Claiming & Borders – Claim territory with basic or reinforced blocks. Claimed land displays colored borders by faction (toggleable per player).

- Passive Resource Veins – Claimed chunks can contain unique veins that automatically generate resources over time. Vein yields and drop chances are fully configurable.

- Citadel Upgrades – Upgrade citadels to expand claim limits. Requirements and level progression are defined via config.

- Sieges & Raids – Launch sieges against enemy factions to weaken, unclaim, or capture their land. Combat drives siege progress in a tug-of-war style system, with configurable penalties, momentum, and point systems.

- Highly Configurable – Veins, claim limits, siege mechanics, timers, and more can be customized to fit server balance.

Warforge is designed for servers that want strategic faction conflict, rewarding both strong defenses and coordinated raids. It combines territory control, automatic resource generation, and structured PvP into one cohesive system.

Links:

- [Mod wiki page](https://wiki.warfactory.co/index.php/Warforge)

- [WarFactory official](https://github.com/Warfactory-Offical/WarForge-Remaintained)

- [Github](https://github.com/Warfactory-Offical/WarForge-Remaintained)
